headline: 5 Simple ETFs to Buy With $500 and Hold for a Lifetime
summary: Even if you have only a modest amount of money to invest, any one of these funds provides the diversified, broad market coverage to serve as the core of your portfolio.

headline: Yum Brands Slices Off Pizza Hut For $2.3 Billion. Shares Rise.
summary: Yum Brands agrees to sell struggling Pizza Hut to a private equity firm and a China-based license partner for a total of $2.3 billion.

headline: Yum! Brands Is Selling One Of America's Most Iconic Pizza Chains For $2.3 Billion— Here's What To Know
summary: Yum Brands sells Pizza Hut to LongRange Capital for $1.5 billion, while China ops go to Yum China for $1.2 billion, boosting focus and restructuring strategy.

raw.summary: Yum Brands sells Pizza Hut to LongRange Capital for $1.5 billion, while China ops go to Yum China for $1.2 billion, boosting focus and restructuring strategy.

headline: Yum Brands sells Pizza Hut to private equity firm LongRange Capital and Yum China for $2.7 billion
summary: Yum Brands is selling Pizza Hut, capping off years of struggles for the pizza chain.

raw.headline: Yum Brands sells Pizza Hut to private equity firm LongRange Capital and Yum China for $2.7 billion

headline: Why DoorDash (DASH) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of on-demand food delivery service DoorDash (NASDAQ:DASH) jumped 12.1% in the afternoon session after oil prices and yields fell as the Trump Administration announced a new peace deal that would lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

raw.headline: Why DoorDash (DASH) Stock Is Trading Up Today
raw.summary: Shares of on-demand food delivery service DoorDash (NASDAQ:DASH) jumped 12.1% in the afternoon session after oil prices and yields fell as the Trump Administration announced a new peace deal that would lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: X-Energy (XE) Powers 13.5% as Cathie Wood Gobbles More Stake
summary: X-Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:XE) is one of the 10 Stocks Stealing the Spotlight from Wall Street Giants. X-Energy saw its share prices increase by 13.50 percent on Monday to end at $21.10 apiece, mirroring the broader market optimism and Cathie Wood’s increased exposure to its stock.
